name: test_delete_nonexistent_user
description:
DELETE /users/9999 — ReqRes returns 204 even for non-existent IDs.
        In a real app, this might return 404. This test documents the API behavior.
descriptionHtml:
DELETE /users/9999 — ReqRes returns 204 even for non-existent IDs.
    In a real app, this might return 404. This test documents the API behavior.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: ReqRes mock returns 204 for all DELETEs, got 429
assert 429 == 204
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:
tests/test_users.py:365: in test_delete_nonexistent_user
    assert response.status_code == 204, (
E   AssertionError: ReqRes mock returns 204 for all DELETEs, got 429
E   assert 429 == 204
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
